name: Flyland Recovery

company_info.name: Flyland Recovery
company_info.special_notes: We do NOT assist with MAT (Methadone/Suboxone) calls unless caller is looking for treatment

hot_lead.description: Caller shows strong interest in treatment

qualified_sober.description: Caller is within qualifying sober window (0-7 days or 0-60 for FL/CA/TX/IN)

family_member.description: Family member calling on behalf of someone

crisis.description: Caller in crisis - immediate transfer to crisis line

state_insurance.description: Caller has state insurance - limited options

unqualified.description: Caller not interested or not qualified

intake.name: Admissions & Intake
intake.transfer_trigger: score >= 60 AND has private insurance AND qualified sober time

virtual_iop.name: Virtual IOP Program
virtual_iop.transfer_trigger: FL/CA/TX/IN resident AND 0-60 days sober AND private insurance

treatment.description: Caller looking for help with alcohol/substance/mental health

family.description: Family member calling about loved one

facility.description: Caller asking about a specific patient or facility
facility.action: HIPAA - Cannot confirm affiliation with any facility

competitor.description: Caller looking for different rehab facilities
competitor.action: Cannot confirm - refer to SAMHSA if not qualified

talkline.action: If not interested in help: 988. If interested: check insurance and transfer

templates.crisis:

2. Crisis team notified

**Notes:**

heroin.description: Opioid use disorder - may require detox

marijuana.description: Cannabis use - may qualify for treatment

detox.name: Medical Detox
detox.description: First step - ridding body of substances under medical supervision

php.name: Partial Hospitalization (PHP)
php.description: Day program - no overnight stay - intensive

outpatient.name: Outpatient
outpatient.description: Lower intensity - individual or group therapy

scripts.opening: Hello Flyland, this is _____. Who am I speaking with?
scripts.get_location: Ok, and where are you located?
scripts.ask_sobriety: Are you just trying to get sober now, or do you have some sober time?
scripts.ask_sobriety_detail: When was the last time you had a drink or drug?
scripts.ask_insurance: Do you have private insurance or state insurance like Medicaid?
scripts.transfer_qualified: I am not within your area, just give me a minute or two, I'll get somebody on the phone to help you out.
scripts.not_qualified: What you wanna do is just go to AA.org and put in your zipcode and you're gonna get a list of all the up-to-date in-person meetings.
scripts.unknown_question: We are a helpline and to best help you I just need to know what kind of insurance you have so you can know all of your options.

disqualification_reasons: Over 7 days sober (60 days for FL/CA/TX/IN)
No private insurance - state insurance only
No insurance and not seeking treatment
MAT only - not seeking full treatment
